name: Mini_Trains_Balance-Rework
title: Mini Trains Balance Rework
author: krustyPl
description: A mod that changes balance of a mod 'Mini Trains' and vanilla train in many ways /nEvery change made is optional and can be turned off with startup mod settings /n/nSpace age patch in future, but you still compatible to run with it/n/nIf You have any requests or found some bugs please report them on the official mods.factorio.com modpage or GitHub repo /n/nCoded with 100% flesh, blood and little bit of tears /n/nList of changes that the mod does is on the modpage on mods.factorio.com or in README.txt inside the mod
